METEOR_STRIKE_DESC: Summon a meteor from the sky, dealing AoE damage on impact and channeling 3 Lightning orbs
MACHINE_LEARNING_DESC: Draw 1 additional attack card each turn
LOOP_DESC: Trigger the passive of the rightmost orb at the start of each turn
COOLANT_DESC: At the start of each turn, gain 2 Block for each unique orb type
BIASED_COGNITION_DESC: Gain 4 Focus. Lose 1 Focus after each battle (max 4 battles)
BULK_UP_DESC: Lose 1 orb slot (min 1). Gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity
STORM_DESC: Channel 1 Lightning orb after playing a skill card
CREATIVE_AI_DESC: Gain an extra ability card reward after each level (regardless of level up)
FERAL_DESC: The first 0-cost card played each turn returns to the end of hand instead of discard pile
ECHO_FORM_DESC: The first attack card played each turn takes effect twice
BUFFER_DESC: The first damage taken each battle is nullified
SPINNER_DESC: Channel a Glass orb at the start of each turn; Glass orb passive fires an additional time
HAILSTORM_DESC: Channel a Frost orb at the start of each turn; at end of turn, release a hail dealing 6 damage if you have a Frost orb
